title: Legnica, Lower Silesian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Legnica, Lower Silesian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Legnica is a city in Lower Silesian with a population of 99,350. A historic city in Lower Silesia with a beautifully restored market square, a copper mining heritage, and a strategic location near the German border.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
